events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Sending out a huge shout to the legendary Brian May, who turns 79 today! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger is 83 today? Still rocking stages worldwide with The Rolling Stones. An absolute icon!

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV burst onto our screens, forever changing music. The first video? The ironically titled 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles. Did video really kill the radio star? We think not!

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' released 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Milestone
angles.copy: It's 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. That album defined a generation and kicked off the Britpop era. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, took place in August 1969.

angles.name: Three Days of Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. An unforgettable moment in history.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977; he would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who left us on this day in 1977. His legacy truly lives forever. He would have been 91.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur was shot dead in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996; he would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Legend
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the incredible talent of Tupac Shakur, who tragically passed away in 1996. His music and message continue to resonate. He would have been 55.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix, one of the most influential guitarists, died on September 18, 1970; he would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, who left us on this day in 1970. His guitar playing changed music forever. He would have been 84.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' released 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on September 26, 1969, in the UK and October 1, 1969, in the US.

angles.name: Iconic Album Cover
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is one of the most famous in history! What's your favourite track from it?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Rebel
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock and roll icon and frontwoman of The Pretenders.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis's charismatic frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: Our kid Liam Gallagher is 54 today! The voice of a generation and still going strong. What's your favourite Oasis anthem?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released 55 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon released his timeless anthem 'Imagine' on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: A World of Peace
angles.copy: 55 years ago, John Lennon gave us 'Imagine', a song that continues to inspire a world of peace. Its message is as powerful today as it was then.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, and released it on November 10, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: 1,000 Songs In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Can you believe it's been 25 years since Apple introduced the original iPod? '1,000 songs in your pocket' – it completely changed how we listen to music!

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the release date of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the ultimate 007 theme song? Let us know!

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles' legendary co-founder, John Lennon.

angles.name: Remembering A Legend
angles.copy: Remembering the incomparable John Lennon, who would have been 86 today. A true visionary whose music continues to inspire generations.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian and actor John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Genius
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th Birthday to the legendary John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true British comedy icon.

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' released 58 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: The Iconic Double Album
angles.copy: 58 years ago, The Beatles unleashed 'The White Album'. A sprawling, diverse masterpiece that showed every side of the Fab Four. What's your favourite track?
